FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_SELF_EXPLODE.title: Self-Destruct
FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_SELF_EXPLODE.descr:
Lose {SelfHpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {EnemyDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Deal {AllyDamage:diff()} damage to all allies.
FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_CHAOS_DRAIN.title: Chaos Drain
FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_CHAOS_DRAIN.descri:
A random ally loses {LoseStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {LoseDexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Gain {GainStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {GainDexterity:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_CASTLING.title: Castling
FRIENDSHIPOVERMOD-F_O_CASTLING.descripti:
Swap your [gold]Block[/gold] with the chosen ally's [gold]Block[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Refund half of that ally's [gold]Block[/gold].|}
